hero_subtitle: SFTY consolidates case risk details by severity, ownership, and status to give compliance leaders a clear, audit-ready view of operational risk across jurisdictions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive visibility fades across case risks
problem_description: Leadership teams lack a consolidated view of case risk severity, ownership and status, which slows informed decision-making. This limited visibility creates challenges in managing operational risk and preparing for audit or regulatory review.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates case risk data by severity, ownership and status into a unified dashboard, enabling leadership to track operational risk clearly and maintain oversight for audit and regulatory readiness.
workflow_title: From case creation to risk overview
workflow_description: SFTY organizes case data, links risk severity and ownership, records status updates, and prepares audit evidence for executive risk review.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than dashboards. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY transforms disconnected case data into a unified risk overview enabling executives to monitor severity, ownership, status, and audit-ready decision evidence in one view.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a structured compliance layer to centralize case risk, preserve audit-ready evidence and support scalable bank due diligence with controlled deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY help visualize case risk by status and severity
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Show how case risk severity affects compliance priorities
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Explain how audit evidence supports risk decision reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY aggregates risk data across jurisdictions
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY offers executives a connected risk dashboard showing case status, severity, ownership and exposures to improve oversight of digital asset compliance operations across jurisdictions.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY show case risk severity?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates risk data from cases, assigning severity levels and highlighting key issues by owner and status for clear operational risk control.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and defensible compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with our existing stack?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers to connect outputs into one compliance workflow layer.
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace underlying providers but structures their outputs into actionable workflows, case management and reporting workflows.
final_title: Review executive risk dashboards with SFTY
final_description: See how SFTY consolidates case risk by severity, ownership and status for clearer compliance visibility and audit readiness.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
